touches.ai_summary: Inbound form submission from Mia Lim at OrbitChannel requesting demo. Interested in CRM automation, currently evaluating Chorus. Professional services firm, 1000 employees, looking to automate rep workflows.

Qualification call with Mia (Head of RevOps). OrbitChannel has 22 reps managing enterprise professional services accounts. Looking to automate CRM data entry and call logging. Mia is champion, has budget authority for tools under $25k. Currently trialing Chorus alongside us.

questions_asked.question: What's driving this evaluation right now?
questions_asked.answer: Rep team is spending 2+ hours daily on manual CRM updates, missing follow-ups

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Chorus for our team size?
questions_asked.answer: We're competitive at this scale, I'll send detailed pricing after discovery

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming discovery call scheduled for next week. Attached case study on professional services automation and high-level pricing guide for 20-30 seat deployments.

Discovery call focused on current workflow pain points. Mia walked through their rep onboarding process and CRM hygiene issues. Discussed integration requirements with Salesforce and their existing tech stack. No other stakeholders on the call.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: Kevin Rodriguez handles vendor procurement, I'll loop him in before contracting

questions_asked.question: Can you integrate with our custom Salesforce fields?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our API supports custom field mapping

questions_asked.question: What's the implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 2-3 weeks for your use case

touches.ai_summary: Second discovery session diving into automation workflows. Mia shared specific rep behaviors they want to capture automatically. Discussed unlimited automation tier benefits. Still no exec or end-user participation.

questions_asked.question: Would it be helpful to have a rep join our next call to see the interface?
questions_asked.answer: Good idea, but let me see the demo first to make sure it's worth their time

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the automation triggers?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable via our workflow builder

objections: We need to make sure this is intuitive enough that reps will actually use it without constant training

touches.ai_summary: Email recap of discovery findings and confirmation of demo scheduled. Attached workflow automation examples specific to their use case.
Reminder email for upcoming demo with agenda. Asked if any other stakeholders should join. Mia confirmed she'll attend solo to evaluate first.

questions_asked.question: Should we invite any of your reps or leadership to the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Not yet, I want to vet it first

touches.ai_summary: Demo rescheduled by Mia due to conflict. Moved to later in the week.
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Full product demo with Mia. Walked through CRM automation workflows, call transcription, and analytics dashboard. Mia engaged, asked detailed questions about Salesforce sync and data accuracy. Compared features directly to Chorus. Still evaluating both platforms.

questions_asked.question: How does your call transcription accuracy compare to Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: We use the same underlying models, accuracy is comparable at 95%+

questions_asked.question: Can we set automation rules by team vs company-wide?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full role-based controls

questions_asked.question: What's your uptime SLA?
questions_asked.answer: 99.9% guaranteed in our enterprise agreement

objections: The UI feels a bit more complex than Chorus, need to make sure reps won't resist adoption
next_steps: Schedule technical eval with sandbox access

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with demo recording, sandbox credentials, and technical setup guide. Asked about timeline and next steps for technical evaluation.

Technical evaluation session. Mia tested sandbox with real Salesforce data. Walked through automation setup and reporting features. Discussed implementation plan and training approach. Mia mentioned Chorus pricing came in lower than expected.

questions_asked.question: What does implementation support look like?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM for first 90 days plus weekly onboarding calls

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline looking like?
questions_asked.answer: Need to finalize by end of quarter, comparing final pricing from both vendors

objections: Chorus quoted us about 20% less for similar seat count, need to understand the value difference

touches.ai_summary: Email with formal proposal for 22 seats, unlimited automation tier. Standard pricing at $24,700 ACV. Highlighted ROI calculator and implementation timeline.
Follow-up on proposal. Mia acknowledged receipt but mentioned still reviewing Chorus final offer. Asked about flexibility on pricing.

questions_asked.question: Is there room to move on pricing to be competitive?
questions_asked.answer: Let's schedule a call to discuss, I can work with my manager on this

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call rescheduled by Mia, waiting on internal alignment before pricing discussion.

Proposal review call. Discussed ROI and pricing. Mia transparent about Chorus being $5k less annually. Asked about discount options. Introduced Kevin Rodriguez (procurement contact) who will handle contracting.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Chorus pricing?
questions_asked.answer: I can bring this to leadership, let me see what's possible

questions_asked.question: What would make this a clear win for you over Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: Your analytics are stronger, but price matters given our budget constraints

objections: Need to justify the price premium to leadership

touches.ai_summary: Exec meeting with Mia to align on business value and competitive positioning. Walked through ROI analysis comparing productivity gains. Discussed discount structure to close gap with Chorus. No exec sponsor from OrbitChannel side present, still just Mia.

questions_asked.question: Who on your leadership team should approve this investment?
questions_asked.answer: I have approval authority up to $25k, this falls within my budget

questions_asked.question: If you can get closer on price, what's the decision timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Could sign within two weeks if we land on terms

next_steps: Loop in Kevin for contract review

touches.ai_summary: Email with revised proposal at $18,100 ACV (26.7% discount) to align competitively. Highlighted expanded implementation support to justify value. Asked for commitment to close by month-end if terms acceptable.

Negotiation call with Mia and Kevin. Reviewed revised pricing and contract terms. Kevin raised questions about annual vs multi-year commitment and payment terms. Mia supportive, wants to move forward.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payment terms instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We typically require annual, but I can check on quarterly for this deal size

questions_asked.question: Are you aligned internally to move forward at this price?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this works for our budget

objections: Annual upfront payment is challenging for our cash flow this quarter

touches.ai_summary: Pricing and terms call rescheduled by Kevin, finance review taking longer than expected.
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Email confirming quarterly payment terms approved and updated contract sent. Asked for confirmation on timeline to execute.
next_steps: Target signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Final pricing and contracting call with Mia and Kevin. Reviewed all terms, confirmed quarterly payment structure, and implementation timeline. Kevin walked through procurement process and signature authority. Both aligned to move forward.

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation after signature?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within 3 business days

questions_asked.question: Any other internal approvals needed before you can sign?
questions_asked.answer: No, we're good to execute once legal reviews the contract

next_steps: Kevin to route for legal review
